scripts.fix: dotnet tool restore && dotnet format style Dse.slnx --verbosity diagnostic --severity info && dotnet format analyzers Dse.slnx --verbosity diagnostic --severity info && dotnet csharpier format . && pnpm --filter dse run lint:fix && prettier --write .
scripts.fix:cs: dotnet tool restore && dotnet format style Dse.slnx --verbosity diagnostic --severity info && dotnet format analyzers Dse.slnx --verbosity diagnostic --severity info && dotnet csharpier format .
